title: The Onchain Legacy of The Park
tagline: Music and art as public goods.

genesis.name: The Park
genesis.note: The first contract deployed by thepark.eth (account nonce #146). Verified owner is thepark.eth. The onchain birthplace of The Park.

portfolio.note: Contracts thepark.eth deployed directly on L1.
Zora edition collections where thepark.eth is the on-chain owner (verified).
Content coins minted through The Park smart wallet.
Nouns Builder DAO on Base. thepark.eth is the #1 token holder.

timeline.title: Genesis on Ethereum
timeline.body: thepark.eth deploys “The Park” (theparkbench), an ERC-721 on Ethereum mainnet. The onchain story begins.

timeline.title: First music collaborations
timeline.body: Fridays At The Park (Arpeggi) and early collaborative music NFTs mint on Ethereum via Zora.

timeline.title: The Ethereum era
timeline.body: Fridays at the Park 002 to 007, “the park with the park,” “a fridays feeling,” and active listening: a run of Zora music drops on L1.

timeline.title: Onto Base for Onchain Summer
timeline.body: The Park arrives on Base (Coinbase L2) with the Onchain Summer drop, 1,650 collectors.

timeline.title: The Base editions era
timeline.body: “the park based,” worldwide (12,898 collectors), season 002 (28,024 collectors), FRIDAY PRESS, and Lasso (20,798 collectors): open editions that brought tens of thousands onchain.

timeline.title: The Park DAO
timeline.body: A Nouns Builder DAO launches on Base with daily auctions funding music, art, and great coffee. 411 tokens, 135 members.

timeline.title: The content-coin era
timeline.body: 136 Zora content coins plus the “thepark” creator coin turn every Friday into a tradable moment. 1,500+ coin holders and counting.

pitch: From a single ERC-721 minted on 2/22/22 to 166 collections, 153,582 items minted, and over 56,446 unique collectors across Ethereum, Base, and Zora, The Park has built a durable onchain body of work: music and art released as public goods, owned by a community of tens of thousands.
